closed_world.value: Elizabethan Court setting with suitors present for St Valentine's Ball
closed_world.quote: All three suitors are now at Court, ready for tomorrow.

investigator.value: Lady Grace Cavendish, Maid of Honour, writing in first person diary format
investigator.quote: It can be a book about me, Lady Grace Cavendish, Maid of Honour.

suspect_architecture.value: Three suitors selected by the Queen as potential husbands for Grace, positioned at Court for the St Valentine's Ball
suspect_architecture.quote: All three suitors are now at Court, ready for tomorrow.

social_world.value: Elizabethan court hierarchy with Queen's authority over marriage arrangements, Mrs Champernowne as supervisor, and obligations of heiresses versus commoners
social_world.quote: being an heiress, I must - though if I were commoner I could wait until I was as old as five and twenty!

investigator_wound.value: Grace's forced marriage situation and loss of autonomy, compounded by being motherless and under royal authority
investigator_wound.quote: I wish I didn't have to marry. I feel far too young to do so

_meta.title: ebook grace cavendish fabiha zaman the lady grace mysteries
